examples: Insatiably greedy people will surely invite misfortunes.
Midas is a legendary king of Phrygia who was insatiably avaricious.
But he insatiably asks the waiter to serve him with even more dishes.
He has been a brilliant, coaxing, insatiably curious listener to the tales of ordinary people.
When she wakes, still insatiably curious and determined, she puts pen to paper and recaptures the gems of her lifelong learning.
